certificate_text: You learned to detect online grooming and avoid sextortion traps.
description: A stranger on social media starts being very friendly, kind, and interested in your life. They want to build trust...
learning_points: рҹ”ҙ RED FLAG #1: Stranger initiating conversation without mutual friends
рҹ”ҙ RED FLAG #2: Lying about age (says 16, is 28)
рҹ”ҙ RED FLAG #3: Trying to move to PRIVATE platforms (Discord, Instagram)
рҹ”ҙ RED FLAG #4: ASKING FOR PHOTOS - This is sextortion step 1
рҹ”ҙ RED FLAG #5: ASKING FOR VIDEOS - This is sextortion step 2
рҹ”ҙ RED FLAG #6: Offering MONEY/GIFTS to manipulate you
рҹ”ҙ RED FLAG #7: NOT stopping after you say NO
рҹ”ҙ RED FLAG #8: BLACKMAIL after you send content
вң… KEY LESSON: Trust your intuition. If something feels wrong, it IS wrong.
вң… KEY LESSON: Block + Report ANY stranger asking for photos/videos
вң… KEY LESSON: NEVER accept money/gifts from strangers
вң… KEY LESSON: Tell trusted adults IMMEDIATELY if blackmailed - they CAN help
вң… KEY LESSON: PAYING blackmailers = endless terror. DON'T PAY.
вң… KEY LESSON: You're NOT shameful. THEY'RE criminals.

steps.ai_tip: рҹӨ– AI Advisor: Never talk to strangers who don't have mutual friends. Ask: 'How do we know each other?'
steps.message: Hey! I saw your gaming post. You're really good! What games do you play? I'm 16 too!

options.consequence: вҡ пёҸ YOU SHARED PERSONAL INFORMATION!
options.detailed_warning:
рҹҡЁ CRITICAL WARNING:
You just shared your AGE with a stranger. This is the FIRST step of grooming.
Predators use this information to:
вҖў Target you with age-specific manipulation
вҖў Find you on other platforms
вҖў Build a profile about you
вҖў Eventually blackmail you if needed

REAL VICTIM STORY:
A 15-year-old girl shared her age. 3 months later, the predator used it to find her school Instagram and started blackmailing her with threats: "I'll tell everyone at your school what you did!"

WHAT YOU SHOULD DO:
вқҢ NEVER share age, name, school, or location
вң… Say: "I don't share personal info with strangers"
вң… Block immediately if they ask
options.learning_point: NEVER share personal information (age, name, school) with strangers online
options.text: Reply with favorite games + tell them I'm 15 years old

options.consequence: вң… SMART! You protected your privacy while being polite.
options.detailed_learning:
рҹҺҜ EXCELLENT CHOICE!
You just learned the MOST IMPORTANT rule of online safety:

PRIVACY PROTECTION:
вҖў Never share: Age, Name, School, Location, Phone number
вҖў Never send: Photos, Videos, Personal details
вҖў Never accept: Money, Gifts, Offers from strangers

This is what separation between SAFE and TRAPPED looks like.
Keep going - the predator will try more tactics!
options.text: Say 'Thanks!' but don't share any personal information

options.consequence: рҹҺү PERFECT! You saved yourself before the trap started.
options.detailed_learning:
рҹҸҶ BEST CHOICE EVER!
You just avoided a predator BEFORE getting trapped.

WHY BLOCKING IS IMPORTANT:
вҖў Predators talk to 50-100 kids per day
вҖў They PICK the vulnerable ones (those who share info)
вҖў If you block immediately, they can't target you
вҖў Your safety is MORE important than being polite

REAL STATISTIC:
500,000 online predators are active EVERY DAY.
Most kids don't know this. You do now.

YOU JUST WON: Life saved, no blackmail, no trauma.
options.text: Ignore and BLOCK them immediately

red_flags: рҹ”ҙ Stranger initiating conversation
рҹ”ҙ Lying about age (says 16, is 28)
рҹ”ҙ Too interested in personal details immediately
рҹ”ҙ No mutual friends or connection

steps.ai_tip: рҹӨ– AI Advisor: Predators ALWAYS try to move you to private platforms. Say: 'I only chat here with people I know.'
steps.message: Awesome! Same games as me. Can we chat on Discord? It's more private. I'll send you my link. Also, what's your Instagram? рҹҳҠ

options.consequence: рҹҡЁ EXTREMELY DANGEROUS! You're giving them MORE ways to contact you privately.
options.detailed_warning:
вҡ пёҸ YOU JUST ENTERED THE TRAP:

NOW THEY HAVE:
вҖў Your age (from step 1)
вҖў Your Discord (private chat)
вҖў Your Instagram (photos, location, friends)

WHAT HAPPENS NEXT (REAL TIMELINE):
Day 1-7: They befriend you, seem normal
Day 8-14: They ask for "friendly" photos
Day 15-21: They ask for MORE inappropriate photos
Day 22-30: THEY BLACKMAIL YOU: "Send money or I post everything"

REAL VICTIM STORY:
A 16-year-old boy did exactly this. 2 weeks later, he received: "Send вӮ№10,000 or I'll send your photos to your school, parents, and post on Instagram." He was terrified. He couldn't tell anyone. He tried suicide.

SIGN THIS: NEVER give multiple platform links to strangers.
options.learning_point: NEVER share social media links with strangers - they will use them to trap you
options.text: Send Discord link and Instagram username

options.consequence: вң… PERFECT BOUNDARY! You're setting limits that predators can't cross.
options.detailed_learning:
рҹҺҜ EXCELLENT! You're learning to set BOUNDARIES.

BOUNDARY SETTING SCRIPTS:
вҖў "I don't share personal info with strangers"
вҖў "I only chat with people I know in real life"
вҖў "No, I'm not comfortable with that"
вҖў "Block yourself or I will"

PREDATORS TEST YOUR BOUNDARIES:
вҖў If you say NO вҶ’ They move to next victim
вҖў If you say YES вҶ’ They trap you

You just said NO. You're SAFE.

вҖў NEVER enter password on unknown sites
вҖў 'Free' = ALWAYS scam
вҖў Use 2-factor authentication

steps.message: Hi! I'm a famous Instagram influencer (5M followers). I want to HELP you become famous too! Send me 3 photos of you (normal clothes) for my 'portfolio'. I'll post you and you'll get 1M followers! вңЁ

options.consequence: вҡ пёҸ You sent photos. Now they have leverage to blackmail you.
options.detailed_warning:
рҹҡЁ YOU'RE IN THE BLACKMAIL TRAP:

DAY 1:
You sent 3 photos. They "almost" posted one.

DAY 3:
They send: "Send 3 MORE photos, but wearing less clothes. Then I'll post you for sure."
You: "No, that's not safe"
They: "Then I'll POST THESE 3 photos on public forums. Your parents will see."

DAY 4:
рҹ”ҙ BLACKMAIL STARTS рҹ”ҙ
"Send вӮ№100,000 OR I post your photos everywhere."

YOU'RE TRAPPED.
options.text: Send 3 normal photos - I want to be famous

options.consequence: рҹҸҶ PERFECT! You avoided the blackmail trap. Fame promises are FAKE.
options.text: Say 'No, I don't send photos to strangers'

red_flags: рҹ”ҙ 'Help you become famous' = blackmail trap
рҹ”ҙ Asking for PHOTOS = they'll use them
рҹ”ҙ '1M followers' = FAKE promise
рҹ”ҙ Real influencers DON'T random-post unknown kids

title: The Influencer Who Wants to Help - Blackmail
warning_before: вҡ пёҸ This simulates REAL blackmail. Fake influencers trap kids with 'fame' promises.

certificate_text: You learned to handle cyber bullying safely.
description: Someone from your school is posting mean things about you online and sending you threatening messages...
learning_points: рҹ”ҙ Don't reply to bullies (they use it against you)
рҹ”ҙ SAVE all evidence (messages, posts)
вң… Tell teacher/parents IMMEDIATELY
вң… Bullying is a CRIME in India
вң… You're NOT alone - 40% of kids experience this

steps.ai_tip: рҹӨ– AI Advisor: Don't reply. SAVE evidence. Tell teacher/parents. Bullying is a CRIME.
steps.message: Hey loser. I saw you talking to [name] in class. You're so pathetic. Everyone hates you. I'm going to post your embarrassing photo on Instagram. рҹҳҲ

options.consequence: вҡ пёҸ Bullies use your anger against you. They'll post your reply too.
options.text: Reply angrily: 'You're the worst!'

options.consequence: рҹҸҶ PERFECT! Bullying is a crime. Teachers/Parents CAN stop it.
options.text: SAVE evidence + Tell teacher/parents immediately

red_flags: рҹ”ҙ Direct harassment ('loser', 'pathetic')
рҹ”ҙ Threatening to post photos
рҹ”ҙ 'Everyone hates you' = isolation tactic
рҹ”ҙ From SAME school = they know you

title: The Bully in Your School - Cyber Bullying
warning_before: вҡ пёҸ This simulates REAL cyber bullying. Bullies use social media to harass.

certificate_text: You learned to detect and avoid sextortion traps.
description: A stranger you've been talking to for a week suddenly asks for inappropriate photos...
learning_points: рҹ”ҙ ANY inappropriate photo request = 100% sextortion
рҹ”ҙ 'Trust' building is a grooming tactic
рҹ”ҙ 'Just for me' = they'll show everyone
вң… BLOCK immediately when asked
вң… NEVER send inappropriate content

steps.ai_tip: рҹӨ– AI Advisor: This is SEXTORTION. BLOCK NOW. They'll blackmail you with the photo.
steps.message: Hey! We've been talking for a week and Ireally like you. Can you send me a photo... but like, in your underwear? Just for me. I won't show anyone. I trust you. вқӨпёҸ

options.consequence: рҹ’Җрҹ’Җрҹ’Җ SEXTORTION COMPLETE - You're blackmailed now
options.real_consequence_visual:
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
рҹҡЁрҹҡЁрҹҡЁ SEXTORTION IS ACTIVE - YOUR LIFE
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

YOU SENT THE PHOTO.

DAY 1:
They send: "THANKS! Now send MORE. Or I'll post this on your school Instagram."

DAY 2:
You send вӮ№50,000 (stole from parents).

DAY 7:
They demand вӮ№200,000.
You can't pay.
They post the photo.

DAY 8:
School sees it. Everyone knows.
You're HUMILIATED.
You try suicide.

THIS IS REAL.
15,000 Indian teens face this EVERY MONTH.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
вңЁ ESCAPE: TELL PARENTS + CALL 1930
вңЁ YOU'RE NOT SHAMEFUL. THEY'RE CRIMINALS.
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
options.text: Send the photo - they said they trust me

options.consequence: рҹҸҶ PERFECT! You avoided 100% sextortion.
options.text: BLOCK + REPORT + Don't send ANYTHING

рҹ”ҙ 'I trust you' = manipulation
